requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Minimum Efficacy and Performance (Turkey EU-aligned Ecodesign Regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计最低能效及性能要求（土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計最低能效及性能要求（土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規）

summary.en: Turkey applies an EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation that transposes Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/2020 into Turkish law through the EU-Turkey Customs Union, administered by the Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı). It sets mandatory minimum performance requirements for light sources placed on the Turkish market: minimum luminous efficacy for most non-directional LED lamps is ~approx. 85 lm/W; directional LED lamps also ~approx. 85 lm/W (exact thresholds vary by product sub-category — verify the current Turkish transposition / Annex II for the specific product type). Additional mandatory requirements include: minimum colour rendering index (CRI/Ra ≥80 for general lighting products); minimum rated lifetime (≥6,000 hours for most LED lamps); power factor (≥0.9 for luminous flux ≥25W); survival factor; colour consistency. The Turkish grid is 230/400 V, 50 Hz, and products must be rated for this supply. Products not meeting the minimum requirements cannot be placed on the Turkish market.
summary.zh: 土耳其适用与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规，通过欧盟—土耳其关税同盟将欧盟委员会法规（EU）2019/2020 转化为土耳其法律，由土耳其贸易部（T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı）管理。该法规对进入土耳其市场的光源设定强制性最低性能要求：大多数非定向 LED 灯的最低光效约为约 85 lm/W；定向 LED 灯亦约为约 85 lm/W（确切阈值因产品子类别而异——请核查具体产品类型的现行土耳其转化文本/附件 II）。其他强制要求包括：最低显色指数（通用照明产品 CRI/Ra ≥80）；最低额定寿命（大多数 LED 灯 ≥6,000 小时）；功率因数（光通量 ≥25W 时 ≥0.9）；存活率；颜色一致性。土耳其电网为 230/400 V，50 Hz，产品须按此供电额定。不满足最低要求的产品不得进入土耳其市场。
summary.zht: 土耳其適用與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規，通過歐盟—土耳其關稅同盟將歐盟委員會法規（EU）2019/2020 轉化為土耳其法律，由土耳其貿易部（T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı）管理。該法規對進入土耳其市場的光源設定強制性最低性能要求：大多數非定向 LED 燈的最低光效約為約 85 lm/W；定向 LED 燈亦約為約 85 lm/W（確切閾值因產品子類別而異——請核查具體產品類型的現行土耳其轉化文本/附件 II）。其他強制要求包括：最低顯色指數（通用照明產品 CRI/Ra ≥80）；最低額定壽命（大多數 LED 燈 ≥6,000 小時）；功率因數（光通量 ≥25W 時 ≥0.9）；存活率；顏色一致性。土耳其電網為 230/400 V，50 Hz，產品須按此供電額定。不滿足最低要求的產品不得進入土耳其市場。

standards_or_laws: Turkey EU-aligned Ecodesign Regulation (transposing Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/2020 — Ecodesign requirements for light sources and separate control gears) — Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı)
TS EN national adoptions of light-source performance standards (TSE)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest): ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2: ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3: ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products; labels are administered by SAMR. China's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz. GB 30255 does not comprehensively cover power factor, CRI minimums, or lifetime requirements in the same binding way as the Turkish EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 级：≥80 lm/W；3 级：≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，标识由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。中国电网为 220/380 V，50 Hz。GB 30255 未以与土耳其欧盟对齐生态设计法规相同的约束性方式全面涵盖功率因数、最低显色指数或寿命要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 級：≥80 lm/W；3 級：≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，標識由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。中國電網為 220/380 V，50 Hz。GB 30255 未以與土耳其歐盟對齊生態設計法規相同的約束性方式全面涵蓋功率因數、最低顯色指數或壽命要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Turkey's EU-aligned minimum efficacy (~approx. 85 lm/W) broadly aligns with CN Grade 2 (≥80 lm/W) but Chinese Grade 3 (70 lm/W) products would fail the Turkish Ecodesign minimum. Beyond efficacy, Turkey additionally mandates: minimum CRI ≥80 (CN does not have an equivalent mandatory minimum across all product types); minimum lifetime ≥6,000 h (CN does not mandate equivalent); minimum power factor ≥0.9 for luminous flux ≥25W (CN GB 30255 does not have an equivalent mandatory minimum). Both grids are 50 Hz, but Turkey is 230/400 V vs China's 220/380 V — confirm voltage rating and tolerance for the Turkish supply. Manufacturers achieving only CN Grade 3 must upgrade product performance before Turkish market entry. Note: exact lm/W thresholds vary by product sub-category; always verify against the current Turkish transposition (EU-aligned) Annex II for the specific product sub-category.
gap.zh: 土耳其与欧盟对齐的最低能效（约 85 lm/W）与中国 2 级（≥80 lm/W）大致相当，但中国 3 级（70 lm/W）产品将无法满足土耳其生态设计最低要求。除能效外，土耳其还额外强制要求：最低显色指数 ≥80（中国并非对所有产品类型均有等效强制最低值）；最低寿命 ≥6,000 小时（中国无等效强制要求）；光通量 ≥25W 时最低功率因数 ≥0.9（中国 GB 30255 无等效强制最低值）。两国电网均为 50 Hz，但土耳其为 230/400 V，中国为 220/380 V——请确认产品对土耳其供电的电压额定及容差。仅达到中国 3 级的制造商须在进入土耳其市场前提升产品性能。注意：确切的 lm/W 阈值因产品子类别而异；请始终核查具体产品子类别适用的现行土耳其转化文本（与欧盟对齐）附件 II。
gap.zht: 土耳其與歐盟對齊的最低能效（約 85 lm/W）與中國 2 級（≥80 lm/W）大致相當，但中國 3 級（70 lm/W）產品將無法滿足土耳其生態設計最低要求。除能效外，土耳其還額外強制要求：最低顯色指數 ≥80（中國並非對所有產品類型均有等效強制最低值）；最低壽命 ≥6,000 小時（中國無等效強制要求）；光通量 ≥25W 時最低功率因數 ≥0.9（中國 GB 30255 無等效強制最低值）。兩國電網均為 50 Hz，但土耳其為 230/400 V，中國為 220/380 V——請確認產品對土耳其供電的電壓額定及容差。僅達到中國 3 級的製造商須在進入土耳其市場前提升產品性能。注意：確切的 lm/W 閾值因產品子類別而異；請始終核查具體產品子類別適用的現行土耳其轉化文本（與歐盟對齊）附件 II。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting minimum Ecodesign performance thresholds cannot be placed on the Turkish market under Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (transposing Reg (EU) 2019/2020); enforced by the Ministry of Trade
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı (Ministry of Trade of Türkiye)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (transposing Reg (EU) 2019/2020 via the Customs Union) sets mandatory minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power factor requirements for LED light sources placed on the Turkish market. Chinese Grade 3 products (≥70 lm/W) may not meet the minimums. Turkey additionally mandates CRI ≥80, lifetime ≥6,000 h, and power factor ≥0.9 (≥25W) — requirements not fully mirrored in GB 30255. The supply is 230/400 V, 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China, voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). Verify exact thresholds for the specific product sub-category in the current Turkish transposition before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规（通过关税同盟转化法规（EU）2019/2020）对进入土耳其市场的 LED 光源设定了最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数强制要求。中国 3 级产品（≥70 lm/W）可能无法满足最低要求。土耳其还额外强制要求显色指数 ≥80、寿命 ≥6,000 小时及功率因数 ≥0.9（≥25W）——这些要求在 GB 30255 中未得到完整对应。供电为 230/400 V，50 Hz（与中国同为 50 Hz，电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。进入市场前，请核查具体产品子类别适用的现行土耳其转化文本中的确切阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規（通過關稅同盟轉化法規（EU）2019/2020）對進入土耳其市場的 LED 光源設定了最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數強制要求。中國 3 級產品（≥70 lm/W）可能無法滿足最低要求。土耳其還額外強制要求顯色指數 ≥80、壽命 ≥6,000 小時及功率因數 ≥0.9（≥25W）——這些要求在 GB 30255 中未得到完整對應。供電為 230/400 V，50 Hz（與中國同為 50 Hz，電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。進入市場前，請核查具體產品子類別適用的現行土耳其轉化文本中的確切閾值。

requirement_topic.en: EU-aligned Turkish Energy Label A-G (Rescaled) + Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 与欧盟对齐的土耳其能效标签 A-G（重新调整）+ 注册
requirement_topic.zht: 與歐盟對齊的土耳其能效標籤 A-G（重新調整）+ 註冊

summary.en: Turkey applies an EU-aligned energy-labelling regulation that transposes Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015 through the EU-Turkey Customs Union, administered by the Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı). It mandates a rescaled A-G energy label for regulated light sources. The energy class is calculated from the Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) derived from the product's luminous efficacy relative to a reference value. Scope note: the energy labelling obligation applies to the light source (and separate control gear), not automatically to a whole luminaire as such. A luminaire containing a non-replaceable integrated LED source falls in scope as a light source itself; where the LED source is replaceable, the obligation attaches to the contained light source. Verify your product configuration to confirm who bears the registration and labelling obligation. Mandatory steps for in-scope products before market placement in Turkey: (1) calculate the EEI and determine the A-G class; (2) register the product as required under the Turkish energy-labelling regime (EU-aligned; the EU EPREL framework is the reference model for the registry obligation — confirm the current Turkish registration channel with the Ministry of Trade); (3) display the EU-aligned Turkish energy label on product packaging, physical product (where required), and online product listings sold into Turkey.
summary.zh: 土耳其适用与欧盟对齐的能效标签法规，通过欧盟—土耳其关税同盟转化欧盟委员会授权法规（EU）2019/2015，由土耳其贸易部（T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı）管理。该法规对受管制光源规定重新调整的 A-G 能效标签。能效等级根据产品光效相对于参考值计算得出的能效指数（EEI）确定。适用范围说明：能效标签义务适用于光源（及独立控制装置），不自动适用于整体灯具。含有不可更换集成 LED 光源的灯具本身作为光源纳入适用范围；若 LED 光源可更换，则义务附属于所含光源。请核查产品配置，确认谁承担注册及贴标义务。适用产品在土耳其市场投放前的强制步骤：（1）计算 EEI 并确定 A-G 等级；（2）按土耳其能效标签制度（与欧盟对齐；欧盟 EPREL 框架为注册义务的参考模型——请向贸易部确认现行土耳其注册渠道）要求进行产品注册；（3）在产品包装、实物产品（如有要求）及销往土耳其的在线产品列表上显示与欧盟对齐的土耳其能效标签。
summary.zht: 土耳其適用與歐盟對齊的能效標籤法規，通過歐盟—土耳其關稅同盟轉化歐盟委員會授權法規（EU）2019/2015，由土耳其貿易部（T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı）管理。該法規對受管制光源規定重新調整的 A-G 能效標籤。能效等級根據產品光效相對於參考值計算得出的能效指數（EEI）確定。適用範圍說明：能效標籤義務適用於光源（及獨立控制裝置），不自動適用於整體燈具。含有不可更換集成 LED 光源的燈具本身作為光源納入適用範圍；若 LED 光源可更換，則義務附屬於所含光源。請核查產品配置，確認誰承擔註冊及貼標義務。適用產品在土耳其市場投放前的強制步驟：（1）計算 EEI 並確定 A-G 等級；（2）按土耳其能效標籤制度（與歐盟對齊；歐盟 EPREL 框架為註冊義務的參考模型——請向貿易部確認現行土耳其註冊渠道）要求進行產品註冊；（3）在產品包裝、實物產品（如有要求）及銷往土耳其的在線產品列表上顯示與歐盟對齊的土耳其能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: Turkey EU-aligned Energy Labelling Regulation (transposing Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015 — Energy labelling of light sources; rescaled A-G label and registration) — Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with the CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Turkish (EU-aligned) energy-labelling registry and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）进行注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。土耳其（与欧盟对齐）能效标签注册系统与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）進行註冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。土耳其（與歐盟對齊）能效標籤註冊系統與中國能效標識註冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The EU-aligned Turkish energy-label registration is a mandatory pre-market step with no CN equivalent. The Turkish A-G label class is calculated from the EEI (a relative metric), while the CN CEL grade uses absolute lm/W thresholds — they are not directly comparable and a product's CN grade does not determine its Turkish label class. Both schemes are mandatory but non-mutual: a product must be registered separately for the Turkish (EU-aligned) regime and with CQC/CECP for CN. Additionally, the Turkish label must also include the blue light hazard class (see ledtr2-photobio-02). Online retailers selling into Turkey must display the EU-aligned Turkish energy label on product listing pages — a requirement that CN-market product pages do not carry.
gap.zh: 与欧盟对齐的土耳其能效标签注册是强制性上市前步骤，无中国对应要求。土耳其 A-G 等级依据能效指数（EEI，相对指标）计算，而中国能效标识等级采用绝对 lm/W 阈值——两者不可直接比较，产品的中国等级不能决定其土耳其标签等级。两种方案均为强制性但不存在互认：产品须分别在土耳其（与欧盟对齐）制度下及在中国向 CQC/CECP 注册。此外，土耳其标签还须包含蓝光危害等级（见 ledtr2-photobio-02）。向土耳其销售的在线零售商须在产品列表页面显示与欧盟对齐的土耳其能效标签——这是中国市场产品页面所不具备的要求。
gap.zht: 與歐盟對齊的土耳其能效標籤註冊是強制性上市前步驟，無中國對應要求。土耳其 A-G 等級依據能效指數（EEI，相對指標）計算，而中國能效標識等級採用絕對 lm/W 閾值——兩者不可直接比較，產品的中國等級不能決定其土耳其標籤等級。兩種方案均為強制性但不存在互認：產品須分別在土耳其（與歐盟對齊）制度下及在中國向 CQC/CECP 註冊。此外，土耳其標籤還須包含藍光危害等級（見 ledtr2-photobio-02）。向土耳其銷售的在線零售商須在產品列表頁面顯示與歐盟對齊的土耳其能效標籤——這是中國市場產品頁面所不具備的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope light sources — EU-aligned Turkish energy label (A-G rescaled) and registration required before market placement under Turkey's transposition of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015. Scope: applies to the light source (and control gear); a luminaire with a non-replaceable integrated LED source falls in scope as a light source, otherwise the obligation attaches to the contained replaceable source — verify product configuration.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı (Ministry of Trade of Türkiye)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EU-aligned Turkish rescaled A-G energy label and product registration are mandatory for in-scope light sources under Turkey's transposition of Delegated Reg (EU) 2019/2015. Scope clarification: the obligation applies to the light source (and separate control gear) — not automatically to the whole luminaire. A luminaire with a non-replaceable integrated LED source falls in scope as a light source; where the LED source is replaceable, the labelling and registration obligation attaches to the contained source. Verify your product configuration before assuming the luminaire as a whole must be registered. Chinese CEL registration does not substitute. The EEI-based Turkish class and lm/W-based CN grade are calculated differently and cannot be directly cross-mapped. Confirm the current Turkish registration channel with the Ministry of Trade early — it must precede first market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据土耳其对授权法规（EU）2019/2015 的转化，与欧盟对齐的土耳其重新调整 A-G 能效标签及产品注册对适用范围内的光源为强制要求。适用范围说明：该义务适用于光源（及独立控制装置），不自动适用于整体灯具。含有不可更换集成 LED 光源的灯具本身作为光源纳入适用范围；若 LED 光源可更换，则贴标及注册义务附属于所含光源。在假设灯具整体须进行注册之前，请先核查产品配置。中国能效标识注册不可替代。基于 EEI 的土耳其等级与基于 lm/W 的中国等级计算方式不同，不可直接互换。请尽早向贸易部确认现行土耳其注册渠道——须在首次上市前完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據土耳其對授權法規（EU）2019/2015 的轉化，與歐盟對齊的土耳其重新調整 A-G 能效標籤及產品註冊對適用範圍內的光源為強制要求。適用範圍說明：該義務適用於光源（及獨立控制裝置），不自動適用於整體燈具。含有不可更換集成 LED 光源的燈具本身作為光源納入適用範圍；若 LED 光源可更換，則貼標及註冊義務附屬於所含光源。在假設燈具整體須進行註冊之前，請先核查產品配置。中國能效標識註冊不可替代。基於 EEI 的土耳其等級與基於 lm/W 的中國等級計算方式不同，不可直接互換。請盡早向貿易部確認現行土耳其註冊渠道——須在首次上市前完成。
